name: profiles/active.sh dry-run set does not modify the persisted profile state file
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro profiles && printf 'active_profile: baseline\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/profile-state.yaml && printf 'rules: {}\n' > profiles/high-risk.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/profiles/active.sh" --set high-risk --state .claude-tdd-pro/profile-state.yaml --profiles-dir profiles --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'active_profile: baseline' .claude-tdd-pro/profile-state.yaml && grep -q 'planned: switch baseline -> high-risk' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
